creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tomasz "CeDeROM" CEDRO from comment #3)

While it's true for AMD that not having firmware will panic it's not true for intel cards (although you won't have suspend/resume working).
Not having all the firmware installed when drm-XXX-kmod is installed is by design yes (to reduce size for embedded images).
You can use the fwget(8) utility to install only the needed firmware for your card.
